_comment: This is an example ticket. Copy this file and fill in your values. Remove all _comment keys before saving.
_comment_id: Format: UPPERCASE_PREFIX-NUMBER. Set your prefix in tandem init.
title: Add user profile endpoint and profile page
_comment_title: Short, imperative. Used as the PR title and branch name suffix.
_comment_status: Always start as 'queued'. The orchestrator manages all other statuses.
_comment_priority: Lower = runs first. Use multiples of 10 so you can insert tickets between.
_comment_depends_on: List ticket IDs that must be 'done' before this ticket starts. Empty array = no dependencies.
user_story: As a registered user, I want to view and edit my profile information so that other users can identify me.
acceptance: User can view their own profile with name, bio, and avatar
User can update their name and bio via a form
Avatar upload accepts JPEG and PNG up to 2MB
Profile page shows a 404 state for non-existent user IDs
_comment_acceptance: Each item must be testable. Both agents use this list to confirm they're done.
be_scope: Create a GET /users/:userId/profile endpoint that returns the user's public profile. Create a PATCH /users/:userId/profile endpoint for authenticated users to update their own name and bio. Create a POST /users/:userId/avatar endpoint that accepts multipart/form-data with an image file, stores it, and returns the public URL. All three endpoints should use the existing AuthMiddleware.
_comment_be_scope: Be specific. Name the HTTP methods, paths, and any business rules. Do not mention UI here.
be_constraints: Use AuthMiddleware from src/middleware/auth.ts for authenticated endpoints
Return { data, error } envelope on all responses — see src/types/api.ts
Store avatars using the existing StorageService in src/services/storage.ts
Postgres only — no new tables without a migration file
_comment_be_constraints: Hard rules the agent must not deviate from. Be specific about file paths.
be_hints: UserModel is in src/models/user.ts — profile fields may need to be added
See PROJ-38 for how we handle file uploads — same pattern applies here
The validation middleware is in src/middleware/validate.ts
_comment_be_hints: Pointers to existing code. Saves the agent from reinventing patterns.
fe_scope: Create a /profile/:userId page that displays the user's profile card with name, bio, and avatar. Add an edit mode (toggle button) that shows a form to update name and bio inline. Add an avatar upload button on the profile page. Use the existing Page layout component.
_comment_fe_scope: Be specific about which views and interactions. Do not mention API endpoints — the contract handles that.
fe_constraints: Use the existing Page component from src/components/layouts/Page.tsx
Avatar upload must show a preview before confirming
_comment_fe_constraints: Hard rules the frontend agent must follow.
fe_hints: UserCard component in src/components/UserCard.tsx is a good reference for the profile display
Loading states should use the existing Skeleton component from src/components/ui/Skeleton.tsx
See /settings page for an example of inline edit mode pattern
_comment_fe_hints: Pointers to existing patterns. Helps the agent avoid reinventing.

meta.notes: This is the first ticket in the user profile epic. PROJ-2 will add social links.
